docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED SEP-23-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BENNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ARTURO GARCIA & DEFENDANT BENNY WONG. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, ARTURO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, BENNY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,200.00 FILED BY GARCIA, ARTURO AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
